description:
Operating Area: Athens / Patras, Greece

M/Y Elena was launched in 1992 and was one of the first yachts to enter the Greek charter market. She was built in Perama Shipyard in Greece. She has a steel hull which offers steady cruising and her entire interior is constructed from oak and mahogany wood. M/Y Elena is a classic displacement yacht featuring ample deck space and a lavish interior. In 2008 her stern was extended and a new swim platform was added for easy access to the sea. In 2016 she was refitted with new upholstery in the saloon, VIP cabin and Master Cabin and had a second sun deck installed. MY Elena can accommodate 12-13 guests in 6 cabins.

In 2023 she had an extensive refit as follows:

-Repainting of the full exterior of the yacht
-New carpets in salon and all cabins
-New bed spreads for all the beds
-New upholstery on sofas in salon
-New sofa in the master cabin
-New exterior sofa on upper deck exterior saloon
-New teak deck chairs, for exterior table on the lower deck
-New sundbeds for upper deck
-Newly restored tender with 70hp outboard
-New bluetooth and usb music stations installed in 5 cabins
-New matresses in Master cabin and 2 twin cabins in 2024

Her main deck features the saloon and dining area, the galley and the VIP cabin. Her mid lower deck features the Master cabin which also has a sofa and her two twin cabins. Two more twin cabins are located in the stern lower deck. All cabins have ensuite facilities and are fully air-conditioned. The crew quarters are located on the lower deck and have a completely separate entrance.
M/Y Elena has a warm feel to her and all her guests feel at home when on board. She has a 4.40mt tender with a 70hp outboard engine, water skis, tubes, rings, snorkeling and fishing equipment are also available on board. Her lovely crew of 5 are always ready to cater to guests needs.

crew.name: Kostas Kartsonakis
crew.bio:
AGE:62 
Captain Kostas graduated from the Merchant Marine School. He spent his initial years working on oil tankers and has been working on luxury yachts private and charter for the last 30 years having earned an excellent reputation in the yachting industry. He is a holder of numerous certificates such as shipboard safety certificate , First aid and Fire Fighting, Speed Boat operators License. He joined M/Y Elena’s team in early 2018 for a couple of years and returned in early 2025. Captain Kostas speaks English and likes spending his free time with his three children.

crew.name: Giorgos Papadopoulos
crew.bio:
Age: 42
Giorgos has been the mechanic on board M/Y Elena for the last 11 years. He has a very wide knowledge of all technical issues and keeps the yacht very well maintained. Giorgos is also the one who will drive the tender when the clients want to waterski or ride on the tubes. Giorgos has a sweet character and a good sense of humour but is always thorough with his work. In his free time he likes going sailing and looking after his olives and vines.

crew.name: Apostolis Papadopoulos
crew.bio:
Age: 69
Captain “Tolis” as he is known, graduated from the Greek Marine Academy and also from the Nautical College of Southampton England. In his early carrier he worked on Greek flagged tanker ships all over the world. In 1992 he took the post of Captain of M/Y Elena and has been part of the team since then. He now holds the place of Yacht Operations Manager and he makes sure that everything runs smoothly on-board ensuring guests satisfaction. His vast knowledge and experience of the Greek waters enables him to suggest the best places for the passengers to visit, picking out small coves and nice swim areas for them. He is the “organizer” of MY Elena and makes sure that everything goes to plan. He speaks English and has a very warm and friendly character. He likes to spend his free time in his village with his two dogs tending to his olives and reading history books .

crew.name: Kyriakos Karousis
crew.bio:
Age: 62

Kyriakos has graduated from the Athenian Cook school and has acquired a vast experience as a cook during his career. Before joining M/Y Elena he worked as a chef in 5 star hotels in Athens, later on he joined the yachting industry adding many years of cooking on yachts. Whereas during the winter months he works as a private cook in villas. Kyriakos joined M/Y Elena in 2019 and has been the cook on board this yacht since. He specializes in Greek cuisine and keeps his guests extremely happy with offering them all kinds of Greek specialties.

crew.name: Alla Pelyak
crew.bio:
AGE: 49
Alla was born in Ukraine and holds full diplomas of the stewardess school in Ukraine. She initially worked on big cruiser lines and from 2008 to 2020 has been the hostess on board M/Y Elena returning in 2025. Alla is a perfectionist with her work and will keep the yacht in top condition and spotless clean. She has a lovely nature, very kind and well-spoken and always on duty to tend to the clients’ needs. She speaks Ukrainian, Russian, English and some Greek.

crew.name: Alexandros Orfanos
crew.bio:
AGE: 19
Alexandros is the youngest of the team and joined M/Y Elena in 2024 He is the deckhand on board always keeping the yacht ready for the clients. Alexandros is always there to greet the guests with a warm smile and assist wherever is needed. He is a fluent English speaker , Russian speaker and also Greek which is his first language.
